name: territory-developer
description: Unity project root scripts delegate to tools/mcp-ia-server (IA / JSON tooling). Local post-implementation checks: npm run verify:local (canonical) — validate:all (includes territory-compute-lib build) then Unity/Postgres bridge chain; npm run verify:post-implementation is an alias. Run npm ci in tools/compute-lib / tools/mcp-ia-server if build or test:ia fails. Bridge-only: npm run db:bridge-playmode-smoke. Local compile smoke: npm run unity:compile-check (loads repo-root .env/.env.local via tools/scripts/load-repo-env.inc.sh; macOS can fall back to Unity Hub path from ProjectSettings/ProjectVersion.txt — AI agents must not skip this because $UNITY_EDITOR_PATH is empty in the shell). Test mode batch load: npm run unity:testmode-batch (tools/scripts/unity-testmode-batch.sh). Scenario builder: npm run unity:build-scenario-from-descriptor, npm run scenario:build-from-descriptor.

scripts.validate:all: npm run validate:dead-project-specs && npm run validate:master-plan-status && npm run validate:backlog-yaml && npm run compute-lib:build && npm run test:ia && npm run validate:fixtures && npm run validate:backfill-fixtures && npm run generate:ia-indexes -- --check && npm run validate:parent-plan-locator && npm run validate:web:conditional && npm run validate:telemetry-schema && npm run validate:runtime-state && npm run validate:cache-block-sizing && npm run validate:claude-imports && npm run validate:agent-tools-uniformity && npm run validate:agent-tools && npm run validate:mcp-readme && npm run validate:mcp-descriptor-prose
scripts.validate:web: npm --prefix web run lint && npm --prefix web run typecheck && npm --prefix web run test && npm --prefix web run build
scripts.closeout:verify: npm run validate:dead-project-specs && npm run generate:ia-indexes -- --check
scripts.unity:test-all: npm run unity:test-editmode && npm run unity:test-playmode
